problem id: c29cdaed
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(6)

examples:
  10011011 -> 11110111
  01101101 -> 10011010
  10100110 -> 11001101
  10000000 -> 00000001
  01001011 -> 01010110
  10110100 -> 01101001
  11100000 -> 11000001
  01011010 -> 00110100

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 11101010
